sqlMap.select: select * from dst_operacion_interna order by nombre asc

select t1.ID_OPERACION_INTERNA, t1.NOMBRE, t1.SINCRONA , t1.CLASE from dst_operacion_interna t1 left join DST_ACCION_OPERACION_INTERNA t2 on t1.ID_OPERACION_INTERNA = t2.ID_OPERACION_INTERNA where t2.ID_ACCION = #id_accion# order by t1.ID_OPERACION_INTERNA
sqlMap.delete: delete from dst_accion_operacion_interna where id_accion=#id_accion# and id_operacion_interna = #id_operacion_interna#
sqlMap.select: select op.* from dst_operacion_interna op where id_operacion_interna not in (select id_operacion_interna from dst_accion_operacion_interna where id_accion = #id_accion#) order by nombre
